html:
Exclusive to:  

Coconuts are a Fruit Food resource found in the Shipwrecked DLC. They are mainly obtained by cutting down fully-grown Palm Trees with an Axe. They are dropped by Palm Treeguards upon death. Additionally, their ranged attack has a 1% chance to leave an intact Coconut. Rolling three carrots at the Slot Machine and, very rarely, digging Sandy Piles also has a chance to drop a Coconut.

There is a 1% chance for Coconuts to fall when chopping a fully-grown Palm Tree on every strike, which equals about 14% chance for at least one Coconut to fall from every tree (when using a standard or luxury Axe), and about 1% chance to get more than one to fall while chopping it down. Each falling Coconut deals 20 damage to the player and it is left on the ground to be picked up afterwards, which can be used as additional source of food or to plant new trees. Falling Coconuts do not affect the regular drops from the tree, which will yield one Coconut and have 33% chance to yield another.

Raw Coconuts cannot be consumed, cooked or used in a Crock Pot. However, Wildbores will eat them despite the player being unable to do so.

Coconuts can also be planted to create Palm Tree Saplings, but only on Barren (Beach) Turfs (the resulting terrain from digging up any other turf).

Halved Coconut

Two Halved Coconuts can be obtained by hacking a Coconut with a Machete. Halved Coconuts can be cooked over fire to obtain Roasted Coconuts. Both Halved and Roasted Coconuts can be eaten directly or used in a Crock Pot and provide a food value of 1 Fruit. Despite having a fruit value, Wildbores will not produce Manure for any.

Roasted Coconut

As Halved Coconuts and Roasted Coconuts don't restore much hunger, and they have as much fruit value as Pomegranates and Durians, they are the most efficient ingredients for Fruit Medley in the Shipwrecked DLC.

"coconut"
“It requires a large nut hacker.”
–Wilson, when examining a Coconut.
“An edible tree thing.”
–Willow, when examining a Coconut.
“Wolfgang will crush with bare hands.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Coconut.
“What secrets must this fruit hide beneath its armor?”
–Wendy, when examining a Coconut.
“DUMB TREE FRUIT”
–WX-78, when examining a Coconut.
“What an enormous seed!”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Coconut.
“It's just a coconut.”
–Woodie, when examining a Coconut.
“Could do considerable damage to a person's noggin.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Coconut.
“It must be cloven to get to the meat.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Coconut.
“The hardest öf fruits.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Coconut.
“Food! From a tree!”
–Webber, when examining a Coconut.
“Imagine getting conked on the head by one of these!”
–Walani, when examining a Coconut.
“Its packaging is tough to open.”
–Warly, when examining a Coconut.
“Aye, me favorite tree fruit.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Coconut.
“'TIS A HEAD NUT.”
–Wilba, when examining a Coconut.
“Ball of belly stuff.”
–Wormwood, when examining a Coconut.
“A tough coconut to crack”
–Wheeler, when examining a Coconut.

Additionally, their ranged attack has a 1% chance to leave an intact Coconut. Rolling three carrots at the Slot Machine and, very rarely, digging Sandy Piles also has a chance to drop a Coconut.

“When I click them together, they make horsey sounds.”
–Wilson, when examining a Halved Coconut.
“Aha! Now you're food!”
–Willow, when examining a Halved Coconut.
“Wolfgang had no problem smacking hard shell apart.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Halved Coconut.
“Two halves that were once whole. Where are you now, Abigail?”
–Wendy, when examining a Halved Coconut.
“NUT-RITION NOW ACCESSIBLE”
–WX-78, when examining a Halved Coconut.
“I managed to pry past its outer defenses.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Halved Coconut.
“One for me and one for Lucy.”
–Woodie, when examining a Halved Coconut.
“I made one coconut into two... Magic!”
–Maxwell, when examining a Halved Coconut.
“I cannot eat it, but I can admire its concave curve.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Halved Coconut.
“I have cleaved the nut and it has shöwn me its insides!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Halved Coconut.
“Now there's one for each of us.”
–Webber, when examining a Halved Coconut.
“You get two for the price of one. Pfft.”
–Walani, when examining a Halved Coconut.
“Delectable.”
–Warly, when examining a Halved Coconut.
“Its flesh be prone fer th'takin'.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Halved Coconut.
“HALF GREATNESS.”
–Wilba, when examining a Halved Coconut.
“Stuff for belly.”
–Wormwood, when examining a Halved Coconut.
“It fits into the Pew-matic now.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Halved Coconut.
Two Halved Coconuts can be obtained by hacking a Coconut with a Machete. Halved Coconuts can be cooked over fire to obtain Roasted Coconuts. Both Halved and Roasted Coconuts can be eaten directly or used in a Crock Pot and provide a food value of 1 Fruit. Despite having a fruit value, Wildbores will not produce Manure for any.

“Now I just need a cake.”
–Wilson, when examining a Roasted Coconut.
“Mmmm, toasty.”
–Willow, when examining a Roasted Coconut.
“Coconut is cooked.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Roasted Coconut.
“It's a little sweet.”
–Wendy, when examining a Roasted Coconut.
“TOASTY AROMA DOES NOTHING FOR ME”
–WX-78, when examining a Roasted Coconut.
“Coconut flesh, quite delicious.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Roasted Coconut.
“Ready to eat.”
–Woodie, when examining a Roasted Coconut.
“It will last me for now.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Roasted Coconut.
“Ah! Roasted coconut. I enjoy its effects on my taste receptors.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Roasted Coconut.
“I shall feast ön this large nut.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Roasted Coconut.
“Just needs a tiny umbrella.”
–Webber, when examining a Roasted Coconut.
“Hmmm. Yep. It's cooked now.”
–Walani, when examining a Roasted Coconut.
“Could use rice and curry spices...”
–Warly, when examining a Roasted Coconut.
“'Tis even better cooked o'er a fire.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Roasted Coconut.
“FWOOSH'DED BALL O' EATS.”
–Wilba, when examining a Roasted Coconut.
“Warm.”
–Wormwood, when examining a Roasted Coconut.
“Looks good. It'd look better flying from the Pew-matic.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Roasted Coconut.
As Halved Coconuts and Roasted Coconuts don't restore much hunger, and they have as much fruit value as Pomegranates and Durians, they are the most efficient ingredients for Fruit Medley in the Shipwrecked DLC.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Dừa là một nguồn Thực phẩm Trái cây được tìm thấy trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Chúng chủ yếu thu được bằng cách chặt cây cọ trưởng thành bằng Rìu. Chúng bị Thần Rừng Dừa đánh rơi khi chết. Ngoài ra, đòn tấn công tầm xa của họ có 1% cơ hội để lại một Dừa nguyên vẹn. Lăn ba củ cà rốt tại Máy đánh bạc và rất hiếm khi đào Cọc cát cũng có cơ hội rơi ra một Quả dừa.

'''Coconuts''' are a [[Fruit]] [[Food]] resource found in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. They are mainly obtained by cutting down fully-grown [[Tree/Palm Tree|Palm Trees]] with an [[Axe]]. They are dropped by [[Palm Treeguard]]s upon death. Additionally, their ranged attack has a 1% chance to leave an intact Coconut. Rolling three carrots at the [[Slot Machine]] and, very rarely, digging [[Sandy Pile]]s also has a chance to drop a Coconut.

There is a 1% chance for Coconuts to fall when chopping a fully-grown Palm Tree on every strike, which equals about 14% chance for at least one Coconut to fall from every tree (when using a standard or luxury [[Axe]]), and about 1% chance to get more than one to fall while chopping it down. Each falling Coconut deals 20 damage to the player and it is left on the ground to be picked up afterwards, which can be used as additional source of food or to plant new trees. Falling Coconuts do not affect the regular drops from the tree, which will yield one Coconut and have 33% chance to yield another.

Raw Coconuts cannot be consumed, cooked or used in a [[Crock Pot]]. However, [[Wildbore]]s will eat them despite the player being unable to do so.

Coconuts can also be planted to create Palm Tree Saplings, but only on Barren (Beach) [[Turfs]] (the resulting terrain from [[Pitchfork|digging up]] any other turf).
